title: Intoxicating Thai Beef Pad See Ew
description: A smoky, charred Thai beef Pad See Ew with feather blade beef, dashi-infused sauce, and comforting noodle base, served hot straight from a ceramic tagine.
instructions: Heat the ceramic tagine over medium-high heat until it shimmers.
Add the sesame oil and swirl to coat the bottom of the tagine.
Toss in the minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Push the garlic to the side and add the feather blade beef, searing until browned on all sides.
Stir in the dashi extract, low-sodium soy sauce, oyster sauce, and black pepper, coating the beef evenly.
Add the Chinese broccoli and stir-fry until tender-crisp, about 3 minutes.
Pour in the cooked egg noodles, tossing to combine and heat through.
Finish with a squeeze of lime juice and a pinch of crushed red pepper flakes for heat.
Remove the tagine from heat and let the dish aerate for 2 minutes to develop flavors.
Serve hot directly from the tagine for a comforting, charred experience.
